description: Weekly aggregated analytics for the Email Productivity Agent. Populated by the Analytics Aggregation flow (Flow 17) every Sunday. Consumed by the Canvas App analytics dashboard.

alternateKeys.purpose: Ensures one analytics row per user per weekly period. Enables safe Upsert during weekly aggregation runs. DateTime (8 bytes) + Text(36) × 2 = 80 bytes, within SQL Server's 900-byte index limit.

columns.description: Human-readable period label (e.g., 'Week of 2026-03-16'). Primary column for display in Canvas App and views.
The Azure AD object ID of the owning user. Part of composite alternate key.
Start of the analytics period (Sunday 00:00 UTC). Part of composite alternate key.
Total follow-up tracking rows created during this period.
Total tracking rows where a reply was detected during this period.
Total nudge cards delivered during this period.
Total nudges dismissed (by user or agent SKIP) during this period.
Average calendar days between sent date and reply detection for rows resolved during this period. Null if no replies detected.

notes.cardinality: One row per user per week. Flow 17 runs weekly and upserts the current period's aggregates. Historical rows are retained indefinitely for trend analysis.
notes.aggregation_logic: Flow 17 queries cr_followuptrackings for the current user where createdon is within the current week. It counts by state (replied, nudged, dismissed) and computes average reply time for resolved rows.
notes.canvas_app_usage: The analytics dashboard screen reads the most recent 12 rows (3 months) to show trends. Summary statistics use the most recent row for current-period numbers.
notes.security: UserOwned table with ownership-based RLS. Users can only see their own analytics.
notes.system_columns: Standard Dataverse system columns (ownerid, createdon, modifiedon, statecode, statuscode) are created automatically.
